name: weavatrix
description: Code graph & blast-radius MCP server: change impact, transitive dependents, health audit, clone detection, coverage mapping over any local repository. Local-first.
long_description: Weavatrix builds a dependency graph of any local repository (tree-sitter WASM, no native toolchain) and serves it over MCP: change_impact, get_dependents, run_audit, find_duplicates (token clones, semantic name-twins, string-literal templates), coverage_map, list_endpoints and more — 23 tools. Languages: JS/TS/TSX/Python/Go/Java/C#/Rust/HTML/CSS. Local-first: source never leaves the machine; the two network-capable tools are an explicit opt-in capability group.

repo_root.title: Repository to analyze
repo_root.description: The local repository Weavatrix starts with. The running server can retarget any other repo later via the open_repo tool.
